steps.title: Identify what the stem requires
steps.content: The stem specifies Winnemucca “directly addresses the reader to explain certain customs.” The defining signal combines two elements: the reader must be directly addressed, and a custom must be explained.

steps.title: Match the dual requirements
steps.content: B directly addresses the reader (“Now, my dear reader,”) and explains a custom: why Paiutes call good people “father” or “mother” because the word is deeply endearing. The other quotations either omit direct reader address or include it without explaining any cultural practice. That matches choice B — B is correct.
